name: create-pr
tagline: Creates and packages draft or ready GitHub pull requests for the React Router repo, including commit/push handoff, PR body, and label.
verdict: Strong, concrete skill: named output contract, explicit failure handling for gh commands, deterministic defaults, and a worked PR-body template. Minor gaps: no explicit out-of-scope statement, gh CLI used without an upfront availability/auth check, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere; scope is only implicitly limited to 'this repository'.
gh CLI used throughout with no upfront install/auth check or requirements note.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
